config._comment: Phase 0g determinism baseline. Empty config — exercises the --config flag path with zero overrides so behaviour matches no-flag runs (within stddev). Statistical gate: median of 3, stddev < 1pp on composite.

Phase 0g determinism baseline. Empty config — exercises the --config flag path with zero overrides so behaviour matches no-flag runs (within stddev). Statistical gate: median of 3, stddev < 1pp on composite.

Phase 0g smoke test config. Flips retrieval_score_exponent (alpha) from default 0.3 to 0.5. Used to verify that --config propagation works end-to-end on both sdk and daemon surfaces. Composite must differ from baseline by >= 0.5pp on at least one sub-score.

Phase 0g smoke test config. Flips retrieval_score_exponent (alpha) from default 0.3 to 0.5. Used to verify that --config propagation works end-to-end on both sdk and daemon surfaces. Composite must differ from baseline by >= 0.5pp on at least one sub-score.

Phase 0g additional smoke. Halves semantic β_c from paper Table 2 default 120d to 60d. Tests the whole Phase 0a chain: SDK config field → adapter config_overrides → engine.compute_retention. Expected effect: faster decay on semantic memories, lowering recall on questions answerable via aged semantic facts.
